evals.prompt: I want to add a new 'post' table to the zero data layer in vine. Each post has id, userId, caption (optional), imageUrl, and createdAt. Users should only be able to read/write their own posts. Show me the model file and tell me what other steps I need to do.

Write a React hook called useUserPosts that fetches all posts for the currently logged-in user, ordered by newest first, plus a function to create a new post. Show me how a component would call it. (Assume the post table from the previous task already exists.)

I want to add comments to posts. A comment has id, postId, userId, text, createdAt. I need: (a) the comment model with permissions so only the post's commenters and the post owner can read, (b) a query that loads a single post with all its comments and each comment's author, and (c) the relationships entries. Walk me through every file I need to touch and the order to do it in.
